'''yajupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chado|chado]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chado|chado]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yajupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæjipith|yæjipith]] || [[word:yæjipij|yæjipij]] || [[word:yæjipish|yæjipish]] || [[word:yæjipi|yæjipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yajujuputh|yajujuputh]] || [[word:yajujupuj|yajujupuj]] || [[word:yajujupush|yajujupush]] || [[word:yajujupu|yajujupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yajuputh|yajuputh]] || [[word:yajupuj|yajupuj]] || [[word:yajupush|yajupush]] || [[word:yajupu|yajupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yajufputh|yajufputh]] || [[word:yajufpuj|yajufpuj]] || [[word:yajufpush|yajufpush]] || [[word:yajufpuf|yajufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yajuputhu|yajuputhu]] || [[word:yajupuju|yajupuju]] || [[word:yajupushu|yajupushu]] || [[word:yajupuku|yajupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yajuputh|yajuputh]] || [[word:yajupuj|yajupuj]] || [[word:yajupush|yajupush]] || [[word:yajupu|yajupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yajuputhul|yajuputhul]] || [[word:yajupujul|yajupujul]] || [[word:yajupushul|yajupushul]] || [[word:yajupukul|yajupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yajuputhuthu|yajuputhuthu]] || [[word:yajupujuju|yajupujuju]] || [[word:yajupushushu|yajupushushu]] || [[word:yajupuku|yajupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yajuputhun|yajuputhun]] || [[word:yajupujun|yajupujun]] || [[word:yajupushun|yajupushun]] || [[word:yajupukun|yajupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yajuputhuoro|yajuputhuoro]] || [[word:yajupujuoro|yajupujuoro]] || [[word:yajupushuoro|yajupushuoro]] || [[word:yajupukuoro|yajupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
